name: canDisturbanceTriggerNow
title: canDisturbanceTriggerNow
syntax: long canDisturbanceTriggerNow(long deviceID, canDisturbanceSequence, canDisturbanceTriggerRepetitions repetitions);// form 2
long canDisturbanceTriggerNow(long deviceID, canDisturbanceFrameSequence sequence); // form 3
long canDisturbanceTriggerNow(long deviceID, canDisturbanceFrameSequence sequence, canDisturbanceTriggerRepetitions repetitions); // form 4
description: Sends a user-defined sequence or a frame-based sequence on the bus with the CAN Disturbance Interface.
The sequence or frame-based sequence sends directly on the bus. If a frame is currently sent by another interface, this frame will be disturbed.
A typical use case is to send a sequence or a frame based sequence on the bus without any trigger conditions.

parameters.name: deviceID
parameters.description: The unique device ID configured via the Network Hardware Configuration dialog for a CAN channel.

parameters.name: sequence
parameters.description: The user-defined sequence or frame based sequence.

parameters.name: repetitions
parameters.description: The repetitions of the output sequence.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
